MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Stephanie Hingle, Esq. 213-312-4008Kuyak Rock LLP for Defendant Nike.
No other Appearance

ARGUED. Ms. Hingle states the other side will not be appearing and seeks clarification from the Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

2 - DEFENDANTs NIKE, INC., NIKE USA, INC.,and NIKE RETAIL SERVICES, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Defendants Nike Inc., Nike USA Inc., and Nike Retail Services Inc.'s unopposed Motion to Admit Counsel Colette N. Bradshears Pro Hac Vice, which is unopposed, is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Rule 9.40 requires that counsel identify "[t]he title of each court and cause in which the applicant has filed an application to appear as counsel pro hac vice in this state in the preceding two years, the date of each application, and whether or not it was granted."
